class.name: ENV
class.brief_description: A singleton class providing robust environment variable loading, parsing, and management functionalities.
class.description: The ENV singleton manages the loading of .env files and integration with system environment variables. It provides a complete toolkit for parsing environment configurations manually, fetching specific data types explicitly with default fallbacks, and pushing environment variables dynamically into OS processes.

method.name: auto_config
method.description: Automatically loads default environment files (e.g., .env) based on the specified search directory and mode string suffix.

method.name: bind_env
method.description: Binds specific environment keys to a node's properties according to the provided property_map Dictionary.

method.name: clear
method.description: Clears all internally loaded environment variables from the module memory. Does not affect the operating system's environment variables.

method.name: config
method.description: Loads environment variables from the specified file. Existing variables in the cache are overridden if override is set to true.

method.name: expand_string
method.description: Expands a string by replacing embedded environment variable markers (e.g., ${VAR}) with their corresponding evaluated values.

method.name: export_json
method.description: Exports the currently loaded environment variables directly into a specified JSON file format.

method.name: generate_example
method.description: Generates an example .env file based on the currently loaded keys, outputting empty templates to the given file path.

method.name: get_all_env
method.description: Retrieves a dictionary containing all currently mapped and loaded environment variables.

method.name: get_env
method.description: Returns the value of the environment variable specified by its key. If it doesn't exist, returns the provided default value.

method.name: get_env_array
method.description: Retrieves an Array of Strings from the environment variable using the specified delimiter string to separate the elements.

method.name: get_env_bool
method.description: Retrieves a boolean value from the environment variable. Evaluates based on the internal true/false string whitelists.

method.name: get_env_color
method.description: Retrieves a Color value from the environment variable, parsing a hex string or comma-separated components.

method.name: get_env_dict
method.description: Retrieves a Dictionary parsed from a JSON string inside the environment variable.

method.name: get_env_files
method.description: Returns an Array of the file paths that have been currently loaded into the ENV singleton.

method.name: get_env_float
method.description: Retrieves a floating-point double number from the environment variable explicitly casting parsing mechanics.

method.name: get_env_group
method.description: Retrieves a dictionary containing all environment variables that start with the exact specified prefix string.

method.name: get_env_int
method.description: Retrieves a strict integer value from the environment variable mapping.

method.name: get_env_vector2
method.description: Retrieves a Vector2 built from a comma-separated list of numerics stored in the environment variable.

method.name: get_env_vector3
method.description: Retrieves a Vector3 built from a comma-separated list of numerics stored in the environment variable.

method.name: get_env_vector4
method.description: Retrieves a Vector4 built from a comma-separated list of numerics stored in the environment variable.

method.name: get_envs_from_file
method.description: Parses and returns a Dictionary of environment variables straight from the given file, without applying them to the global cache.

method.name: get_envs_matching
method.description: Retrieves a dictionary of environment variables that match the specified regular expression pattern string.

method.name: get_missing_envs
method.description: Checks a list of keys and returns a String Array containing all keys that are currently missing from the loaded environment.

method.name: get_prioritize_os_env
method.description: Returns true if OS system environment variables continuously take precedence over user-loaded .env cached values.

method.name: has_env
method.description: Returns true if the environment variable specified by the key exists within the mapped memory limit or system.

method.name: has_env_file
method.description: Returns true if the specified environment file path has already been processed and loaded.

method.name: load_env_file
method.description: Loads environment configurations from the specified file path into the memory cache. Optionally overrides existing mapped variables.

method.name: parse
method.description: Parses the provided multi-line environment String data directly into a mapped key-value Dictionary.

method.name: parse_buffer
method.description: Parses the provided byte array buffer directly assuming standard UTF-8 environment rules, returning a mapped Dictionary.

method.name: populate
method.description: Populates the underlying system module with variables loaded from the provided dictionary. Extends the existing configuration safely.

method.name: push_to_os_env
method.description: Pushes all currently loaded memory environment variables directly securely into the OS's environment context.

method.name: refresh
method.description: Refreshes the loaded environment variables by attempting to reload previously accessed standard configurations.

method.name: remove_env
method.description: Removes an individual environment variable perfectly mapped under the specified key from the active limits.

method.name: require_envs
method.description: Checks an Array of keys, ensuring all are explicitly present. Returns false if any single key is missing from the environment cache.

method.name: save
method.description: Saves the fully evaluated current environment variables from memory tracking out to the target OS file.

method.name: set_bool_whitelist
method.description: Sets explicit String arrays denoting what distinct term strings evaluate to true and false during get_env_bool queries.

method.name: set_env
method.description: Manually sets a specific environment variable directly to a Variant object within the cache, without updating an underlying file.

method.name: set_prioritize_os_env
method.description: Toggles if native external OS environment variables should be prioritized explicitly over local cached file maps during get requests.

method.name: set_resolver
method.description: Overrides standard internal lookup mechanisms tightly applying a custom Callable for fetching runtime environment logic.

signal.name: cleared
signal.description: Signal emitted when all environment variables are cleared.

signal.name: file_loaded
signal.description: Signal emitted when a file is loaded.

signal.name: refreshed
signal.description: Signal emitted when environment variables are refreshed.

signal.name: updated
signal.description: Signal emitted when an environment variable is updated.
